variables.name: Adjusted methotrexate clearance
variables.description: Methotrexate clearance adjusted for protocol, treatment arm, infusion, gender, genetically determined race; mean clearance among patient population was normalized to zero.

variables.name: Protocol
variables.description: Children's Oncology Group P9904 and P9905 protocols. See Ramsey LB, et. Al. Blool 121(6):898-904, 2013 (PMID:23233662) for details.

variables.name: SUBJECT ID
variables.description: De-identified subject identifier

variables.name: Treatment arm
variables.description: Treatment arms in COG P9904/P9905 protocols.

variables.name: average methotrexate clearance
variables.description: Methotrexate clearance averaged over multiple courses for each patient

variables.name: gender
variables.description: Male or female

variables.name: genetically determined Race
variables.description: Race genetcially determined using STRUCTURE with genome-wide mapping array

variables.name: infusion
variables.description: Methotrexate 4-hour infusion of a 2g/m2 dose or 24 hour infusion of a 1g/m2 dose

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
